summary: Composite Build Directive v2.9.5 - Backend and Frontend Testing Complete. All 7 backend API tests passed. Frontend features verified through code review and Playwright testing.

minor.issue: Intermittent 503/502 errors in console - does not block functionality, appears to be pod scaling or websocket connection issues

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/records/duplicates requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/records/duplicates returns proper structure with is_hydrated, total_spins, spin_count per record
Backend: GET /api/records/duplicates has NO needs_review field (removed per v2.9.5)
Backend: DELETE /api/records/duplicates/clean requires auth (401)
Backend: DELETE /api/records/duplicates/clean returns removed_count AND spins_merged fields
Backend: POST /api/records/hard-refresh-images requires auth (401)
Backend: POST /api/records/hard-refresh-images returns total_placeholders/fixed/failed fields
Backend: POST /api/records/hard-refresh-images works for regular user (user-scoped, not admin-only)
Frontend: CollectionPage loads without errors after login
Frontend: 'Fix Images' button visible with data-testid='hard-refresh-images-btn'
Frontend: RecordCard has 'flex flex-col' layout (verified via code and Playwright)
Frontend: RecordCard has 'flex-grow' text container
Frontend: RecordCard text area has min-height 80px
Frontend: Duplicate modal opens correctly with no 'review' badge
Code Review: VinylVariantPage.js uses 'The Honeypot Price' label (lines 243, 271)
Code Review: VinylVariantPage.js uses data-testid='honeypot-price-card' (lines 239, 267)
Code Review: VariantReleasePage.js uses 'The Honeypot Price' in scarcity section (line 184)
Code Review: VariantReleasePage.js uses data-testid='honey-market-stat' (line 181)
Code Review: VariantReleasePage.js uses 'The Honeypot Price' in Market Value section (line 249)
Code Review: VariantReleasePage.js uses data-testid='honeypot-price-card' (line 245)
Code Review: No 'Honey Market' text found in VinylVariantPage.js or VariantReleasePage.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Composite Build Directive v2.9.5 verified. Smart De-Duplication: GET /api/records/duplicates returns is_hydrated, total_spins, spin_count per record (NO needs_review field). DELETE /api/records/duplicates/clean returns removed_count AND spins_merged. POST /api/records/hard-refresh-images is user-scoped (not admin-only). RecordCard uses flex flex-col layout with flex-grow text container (min-height: 80px) - 'Spin Now' buttons align at bottom. Terminology Lock: VinylVariantPage.js and VariantReleasePage.js both use 'The Honeypot Price' (no 'Honey Market' references remain). All data-testid attributes verified: hard-refresh-images-btn, honeypot-price-card, honey-market-stat.

frontend_components: Duplicate modal shows spin count for groups with spins (data-testid='dupe-spins-{i}')
